task_description: Create a masterpiece-quality HTML version of the MiUHC Premium Calculator. A Python script (generate_html.py) extracts premium data from PDFs and produces a single self-contained HTML file with beautiful UI, real-time calculations, tab switching (Konvensional/Syariah), and Manulife branding.

verification.summary: generate_html.py runs successfully, produces 62KB self-contained HTML file with all premium data embedded. All verification checks pass. Review fixes applied: animation re-trigger (JS class approach), duplicate plans filtered out of Semua Plan section, escapeHtml utility added for XSS prevention.
